description: Created using cotton fabric, this cap from adidas is a perfect blend of comfort and style. Crown made of cotton fabric with embroidered eyelets to offer breathable comfort to the head Curved visor with embroidered brand badge on the front and adidas patented 3-Stripes embroidered in white on the visor Adjustable back strap for a customised Fit Cap care Hand wash in cold water Do not tumble dry or dry clean
